summary: Branch contains run artifacts but does not include the required template and code updates; acceptance criteria are not met.

requirement_checks.requirement: PASS review renders new Factory Review header without legacy clutter
evidence: git diff origin/main..HEAD: no changes to scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md or related template files

requirement_checks.requirement: REQUEST_CHANGES review shares layout and preserves detailed findings
evidence: git diff origin/main..HEAD: no changes to scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md or helper code

requirement_checks.requirement: Traceability appears as a single collapsible block in both comment and review.md
evidence: review.md in this run was generated as an artifact but source rendering helpers (scripts/lib/review-output.mjs) were not updated in the branch

requirement_checks.requirement: Refactor buildReviewConversationBody and update templates per plan.md
evidence: git diff origin/main..HEAD: no edits to scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs or scripts/templates/github-messages/*.md

requirement_checks.requirement: Update review authoring prompt to omit manual methodology instruction
evidence: git diff origin/main..HEAD: .factory/prompts/review.md not modified in this branch

findings.title: Implementation files for templates and helpers are missing
findings.details: The branch contains only `.factory/runs/105/` artifacts and usage-event logs. The source files named in the spec/plan (e.g., `scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md`, `scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs`, `scripts/lib/review-output.mjs`) were not changed or added in this branch, so the implementation is absent.
findings.recommendation: Commit the template and helper changes described in .factory/runs/105/spec.md and .factory/runs/105/plan.md, then update tests and re-run CI.

findings.title: Acceptance tests cannot be validated against missing implementation
findings.details: Acceptance tests in .factory/runs/105/acceptance-tests.md require changes to rendering and tests. Without the source changes, those acceptance tests cannot be executed or validated.
findings.recommendation: Implement code changes, update tests and snapshots in `tests/`, and attach CI run evidence that exercises the new formatting.

findings.title: Insufficient CI evidence for claimed behavior
findings.details: CI metadata (workflow id 23614136486) shows unit and actionlint jobs passed, but there is no evidence that the new comment formatting was produced because the implementation files are absent. The run artifacts show only generated review artifacts, not the generator code.
findings.recommendation: Provide CI run logs showing the updated templates producing the target comment body, or include a link to the PR that contains the implementation with passing tests.

findings.title: Consider including cross-PR linkage
findings.details: If the implementation will land in a separate PR, add a note in this run or in the approved issue indicating the relationship so reviewers understand the dependency.
findings.recommendation: Add a short note to `.factory/runs/105/approved-issue.md` and the PR description linking the implementation PR.
